name: calib_baseline_seed3
hypothesis: all 7 prior runs use seed=0, so the 0.28-0.31 tokacc spread (incl. exp006's 'best' 0.308) may be eval/training noise not real config effects; re-running exp001's exact stable config with seed 3 measures true run-to-run variance — if it lands ~0.29+/-0.03 the plateau is a genuine seed-independent ceiling (-> Phase 2), if it shifts substantially seed-0 is a confound and earlier results need re-reading.
